What We Buy

Every piece tells a story — we'll value yours.

From fine gold and rare diamonds to iconic timepieces, our experts appraise it all with precision and discretion.

Gold

24K, 22K, 21K, 18K, 14K — gold jewelry, scrap gold, gold bars, coins & heirlooms.

Diamonds

Engagement rings, loose stones, and any fine jewelry set with diamonds.

Luxury Watches

Patek Philippe, Cartier, Rolex, Audemars Piguet and other high-end timepieces.

Pawn Tickets

We buy pawn tickets and turn them into instant cash for you.
